ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the exercise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exercise */,
  "code_template" TEXT /* Code template for the exercise */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language for the exercise */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the exercise */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exercise was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exercise was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the exercise */,
  "is_community_created" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exercise was created by a community user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise being submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was made */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code submitted by the user */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the system */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the submission is correct */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score for the submission */,
  "is_community_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the submission has been reviewed by the community */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the submission */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was reviewed */,
  "review_feedback" TEXT /* Detailed feedback from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_forum" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise related to the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "post" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "responses" TEXT /* Responses to the post */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is sticky (pinned to the top) */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is locked (no more responses allowed) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity (post or response) */,
  "is_community_post" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post was created by a community user */,
  "parent_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent post (for responses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forum_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forum_parent_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_post_id") REFERENCES discussion_forum ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forum_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise being tagged */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the exercise */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "is_community_tag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag was created by a community user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_tags_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id")
)
